description: Trigger discrimination for the Phase 3 access & events cluster. Pins the internal audit record apart from authorization design and integration event contracts.

cases.prompt: We need a tamper-evident, tenant-scoped record of every admin action, permission change, and data export — auditors will ask for it.
cases.reason: Recording what happened durably and provably is the audit trail; no permissions are being designed and no integration consumes this.

cases.prompt: Decide which roles can change billing, who can export data, and how support gets temporary access.
cases.reason: This designs who CAN act; the audit trail records that they DID — different deliverable.

cases.prompt: Partners want to receive an event whenever a record changes in a workspace they integrate with — design that feed.
cases.reason: Externally consumed event contracts with delivery semantics — an integration surface, not an internal record.
